crime.value: Serial murders staged by corrupt police officer Harry Mason to frame innocent people
crime.quote: You set the murders up. Was it every single one of them? Did any of them happen without you?

victim.value: Multiple victims killed by Harry Mason, plus the innocent people framed for the crimes
victim.quote: How many people had she had arrested? Some of them had even confessed to the killings.

closed_world.value: Small town where Eddie Reynolds repeatedly investigates crimes, trapped in cyclical reality
closed_world.quote: this sad little town was always in mourning for someone or other

culprit_and_motive.value: Harry Mason (police officer) commits murders, motive unclear but involves controlling Eddie's investigations
culprit_and_motive.quote: You did it, You killed all of those people.

resolution.value: Eddie discovers ash evidence proving Harry's presence at crime scenes, but reality resets before justice
resolution.quote: There was a discoloration in the ash. She studied the pattern of the blood across the carpet.

investigator.value: Eddie Reynolds (Edwina), transgender detective who discovers the corruption in repeated cycles
investigator.quote: Eddie Reynolds? Like... Edward? Edwina, she said.

suspect_architecture.value: Three suspects with distinct roles: Harry Mason (serial killer with means and opportunity), Dick (accomplice with access), unnamed kid cop (potential witness/unwitting participant)
suspect_architecture.quote: Harry watched her from the window, impassive as a python with a full belly. Off to her left, Dick smirked

red_herring.value: Weekly pattern of cigar ash at crime scenes designed to implicate innocent suspects while concealing Harry's systematic murder setup
red_herring.quote: Week after week, his discarded ash at the scene of every crime

clue_fairness.value: Blood crusted on top of ash reveals temporal sequence - ash placed before blood, indicating premeditation and scene staging
clue_fairness.quote: There was a discoloration in the ash. She studied the pattern of the blood across the carpet

social_world.value: Police corruption network where authority figures manipulate investigations and coerce confessions from innocent people
social_world.quote: Some of them had even confessed to the killings. After Harry had gotten through with them, mostly

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence layering - blood deposited after ash proves the crime scene was pre-staged, demonstrating systematic deception
reveal_mechanic.quote: It was soaked in, mostly, but some of it was crusted. On top of the ash

investigator_wound.value: Eddie's transgender identity and false imprisonment in repeated crime scenarios, with identity erasure and forced role-playing as punishment
investigator_wound.quote: They had made her a man, or tried. In her past life, she had killed someone

_meta.title: ebook aaron redfern mad like a simile
